title: fix(gen): bump AssemblyAI transcription poll timeout 120s → 240s
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Real-world traffic shows ~7 daily transcription jobs timing out at exactly the 120s cap (measured durations 121-124s)
- Doubling to 240s — same bounded-polling shape, more realistic room for longer audio files

## Test plan
- [x] \`npx tsc --noEmit\` clean
- [x] transcription tests pass (5/5)

gist.headline: More time to listen
gist.blurb: We've doubled the timeout for AssemblyAI transcriptions from 120s to 240s. Now your longer audio files have the breathing room they need to finish processing without getting cut off.
gist.summary: Increased the AssemblyAI transcription polling timeout from 120s to 240s to prevent longer audio files from failing.
gist.impact: Users transcribing longer audio files will no longer see jobs fail at the 2-minute mark.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot waiting patiently by a retro tape recorder or gramophone. The robot is holding a stopwatch, symbolizing the extended timeout.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot sitting patiently next to a retro reel-to-reel tape recorder. The robot holds a tiny pixelated stopwatch. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
